title: Default components to OnPush or signals
description: Run change detection on explicit inputs and observable emissions rather than on every Zone-tracked event.
body: Use when building or optimizing a component, especially in a large tree. Do not leave everything on default change detection where any event re-checks the whole tree. Actions: set ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush so the component re-renders only when an @Input reference changes, an observable bound via async emits, or an event fires inside it; treat inputs as immutable and replace objects rather than mutate; or adopt signals which mark consumers dirty precisely. Validation signals include a test asserting an OnPush component does not re-render when an input is mutated in place but does when replaced. Risk boundary: mutating an OnPush input in place produces a silently stale view; signals and OnPush both require treating state as replaced, not mutated.
